_metadata.description: Enriched taxonomy generated by merging master taxonomy with unique terms from cv_job_structured_features_normalized.csv.
notes: Normalization dictionary contains original aliases plus identity mappings for taxonomy terms.
This file is intended for resume parsing, job parsing, structured scoring, feature engineering, and semantic normalization.

candidate_skill_dictionary_enrichment.selection_policy: Conservative: added only candidate_skill terms that are clear CV skills, tools, technologies, methods, or professional competencies; rejected generic words, job titles, degrees, locations/companies, adjectives, and noisy fragments.
